## Checklist
- [ ] Follows the branching/commit conventions in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Placed in the correct folder per the repository structure in README.md
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real employee data included
- [ ] Reviewed by at least one other team member
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour/scope changed
